evidence: recent data suggests we're holding onto losing long positions for too long, and cutting losses earlier might improve our overall performance.
raw_rule: IF (position == 'LONG' && upnl < -$0.50) THEN close_position BECAUSE recent data suggests we're holding onto losing long positions for too long, and cutting losses earlier might improve our overall performance.

evidence: FARTCOIN has shown high volatility, and taking profits quickly might help us capitalize on its rapid movements.
raw_rule: IF (coin == 'FARTCOIN' && price_change > 10% in last 24 hours) THEN take_profit BECAUSE FARTCOIN has shown high volatility, and taking profits quickly might help us capitalize on its rapid movements.

evidence: our current short-selling strategy seems ineffective, and we should be more cautious when considering short positions to avoid unnecessary losses.
raw_rule: IF (direction == 'SHORT' && confidence_level < 0.7) THEN reject_signal BECAUSE our current short-selling strategy seems ineffective, and we should be more cautious when considering short positions to avoid unnecessary losses.
